summary: Comprehensive testing of LD Finance V2.0 with 10 new features completed. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new components and features are working correctly.

minor.issue: Initially failed due to .env file formatting issue (ADMIN_EMAILS and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY were concatenated on same line). Fixed by correcting .env format.

critical_code_review_comments: Bank endpoints correctly implement CRUD operations with user isolation
Social/connection endpoints properly handle pending/accepted/rejected states with notifications
Shared transactions correctly create creator's transaction immediately and friend's transaction on accept
Document upload uses Emergent object storage integration correctly
Admin endpoints properly verify admin status before allowing access
Budget comparison endpoint correctly supports budget_type param (expense/income)
Profile visibility toggle correctly updates is_public field
AnimatedLogo component has slower animation timings (800ms, 1800ms, 3600ms, 4600ms, 5600ms)
Footer shows animated logo + tagline 'Decisiones financieras inteligentes, resultados reales'
Community page has all 4 tabs: Usuarios, Conexiones, Notificaciones, Compartidos
seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created/cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 V2.0 features tested and working: 1) Dashboard auto-scroll fix (AdvisorChat only scrolls on messages.length change), 2) Slower logo animation (phases at 800ms, 1800ms, 3600ms, 4600ms, 5600ms), 3) Income projected vs actual on dashboard (GET /api/budgets/comparison?budget_type=income), 4) Bank management in profile + bank selector in transactions, 5) Admin full access to user accounts (view+edit via /api/admin/users/{id}/dashboard and related endpoints), 6) Document upload in profile (object storage via Emergent integrations), 7) Benefits section in profile (Pagano, 3 Esencias, Visoc), 8) CurrencyInput in survey for all money fields, 9) Social network (Community page with tabs, connections, notifications, shared transactions), 10) Footer logo + tagline. Auth uses Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via session cookie injection.
tests_passed: GET /api/banks returns empty list for new user
GET /api/community/users returns users with connection status
POST /api/connections/request creates connection request with notification
POST /api/transactions/shared creates shared transaction with notification
POST /api/documents/upload uploads file to object storage
Non-admin user cannot access admin endpoints (403)
frontend_tests_passed: Landing page loads with animated logo (slower animation)
Footer shows animated logo + tagline 'Decisiones financieras inteligentes, resultados reales'
Profile page shows banks management section with Agregar button
Profile page shows documents section with Subir button
Profile page shows benefits section (Pagano 10%, 3 Esencias 10%, Visoc 15%)
Profile page shows public/private toggle button
Community page loads with all 4 tabs (Usuarios, Conexiones, Notificaciones, Compartidos)
Dashboard has expense budget comparison section (Proyectado vs Real)
Dashboard has income budget comparison section (Ingresos: Esperado vs Real)
Survey uses CurrencyInput for all money fields

bank_management.details: Profile page has 'Mis Bancos' section with add/delete functionality. Banks API endpoints working correctly.

social_network.details: Community page with 4 tabs. Connection requests create notifications. Shared transactions work with accept/reject flow.

document_upload.details: Profile page has 'Mis Documentos' section with upload button. Uses Emergent object storage integration.

admin_user_access.details: Admin can view full user dashboard, create/update/delete debts and transactions for any user.

income_budget_comparison.details: Dashboard has 'Ingresos: Esperado vs Real' section. API supports budget_type=income parameter.

profile_visibility.details: Profile page has public/private toggle. API correctly toggles is_public field.

benefits_section.details: Profile page shows 'Beneficios LD Holdings' with Pagano (10%), 3 Esencias (10%), Visoc (15%) discounts.

currency_input_survey.details: Survey page uses CurrencyInput component for monthly_income, monthly_expenses, current_savings, total_debt fields.

animated_logo.details: AnimatedLogo component with slower timings. Shows 'LD Holdings' then transitions to 'LD Finance'.

footer_tagline.details: Footer shows animated logo + 'Decisiones financieras inteligentes, resultados reales' tagline.

env_fix_applied.issue: Line 4 had ADMIN_EMAILS and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY concatenated without newline
env_fix_applied.fix: Separated into two lines with proper formatting
